name: team field with matchup_opponent_type param
description: Test case for team field with matchup_opponent_type param
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE'), "t02019a71cd7c60beef158f6778ff2eea" as materialized (select "team", "year", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count" from ((select "h" as "team", "year" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024)) union all (select "v" as "team", "year" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024))) as "g" group by "team", "year"), "rate_aggregate_2e76db32748d" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."pos_team" as "team_code", SUM(pass_yds) AS m_8ccc10433265 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.pos_team), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2026) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2026) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "t80d407cc6173f44f229175cb2d206544" as (select "year", "week", v as nfl_team, h as game_opponent, true as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2025_REG_WEEK_1') union select "year", "week", h as nfl_team, v as game_opponent, false as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2025_REG_WEEK_1')) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos" AS "pos_0", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_2e76db32748d.m_8ccc10433265) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t02019a71cd7c60beef158f6778ff2eea.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" left join "t02019a71cd7c60beef158f6778ff2eea" on "t02019a71cd7c60beef158f6778ff2eea"."team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" left join "rate_aggregate_2e76db32748d" on "rate_aggregate_2e76db32748d"."team_code" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2026 inner join "t80d407cc6173f44f229175cb2d206544" on "t80d407cc6173f44f229175cb2d206544"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and "t80d407cc6173f44f229175cb2d206544"."year" = "player_year_teams"."year" where t80d407cc6173f44f229175cb2d206544.game_opponent IN ('WAS', 'ARI', 'LAR') group by "current_week_opponents"."opponent", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
